bead.title: build(feat-003): PROV-O audit serialization (additive)
bead.description:
Per FEAT-003 US-010 and ADR-020 Â§RDF concept adoption.

Add additive PROV-O serialization to audit queries. Native JSON audit shape unchanged; PROV-O surfaces via Accept: application/ld+json with PROV @context, or via ?format=prov query parameter.

Mapping: operationâ†’prov:Activity; affected entity/linkâ†’prov:Entity (note: PROV-O 'Entity' broader than Axon's, see FEAT-003 US-010 naming-clash note); actorâ†’prov:Agent; beforeâ†’prov:used; afterâ†’prov:wasGeneratedBy; actorâ†”activityâ†’prov:wasAssociatedWith; transaction chainâ†’prov:wasInformedBy; timestampâ†’prov:startedAtTime/endedAtTime.

Subject IRIs use canonical entity URLs per ADR-020.
bead.acceptance: AC1. Audit query supports content negotiation (Accept: application/ld+json with PROV @context) and ?format=prov. AC2. Native JSON audit shape unchanged. AC3. PROV-O output validates against the official PROV-O ontology. AC4. Round-trip test: native JSON â†’ PROV-O â†’ re-import preserves all auditable facts. AC5. cargo test passes; clippy clean.
